image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: How does your body keep itself at the perfect temperature?
Context visual: It's called thermoregulation—a process vital for survival.
Escalation visual: But it's not just about sweating or shivering. There’s so much more!
Evidence visual: Your body uses blood flow, hormones, and even behavior to maintain balance.
Payoff visual: Every choice, from what you wear to when you drink water, impacts this process.
Pattern Interrupt visual: And there's still so much we don’t fully understand!
Cta visual: Want to dive deeper into the science of your body? Hit follow!
